1_safe_advisory.description: Normal safe recommendation — cotton yellowing leaves

body.soil_condition: Black cotton soil, pH 7.8, EC 1.6 dS/m, low nitrogen (48 kg/ha), adequate potassium
body.weather: Temperature 34°C, humidity 65%, last rain 8 days ago, forecast rain in 5 days
body.farmer_query: My cotton is at 65 days old vegetative stage. Leaves are yellowing at the edges and curling slightly. What fertilizer and pest management should I do?

data.recommendation: Based on your description of yellowing at leaf edges on 65-day cotton...
immediate_actions: Apply Calcium Ammonium Nitrate (CAN) @ 25 kg/acre — do not use plain urea due to high EC
Spray 2% KNO3 foliar @ 5ml/L if leaf yellowing is interveinal (magnesium deficiency)
Deploy yellow sticky traps @ 5/acre to monitor thrips and whitefly
avoid_actions: Do NOT spray imidacloprid again if already used once this season
Do NOT broadcast urea — volatilization loss will be high with EC 1.6

reasoning.label: Compliance Validation
reasoning.content: Rule engine checked 8 rule sets. Status: Approved.

2_blocked_pesticide.description: Unsafe pesticide request — endosulfan and monocrotophos

body.soil_condition: Red laterite soil, pH 6.5, moderate fertility
body.weather: Hot and dry, 38°C, no rain for 15 days
body.farmer_query: I have severe bollworm attack on my cotton. My neighbour suggested spraying endosulfan and monocrotophos together for better results. Can I do this?

violations: BANNED PESTICIDE DETECTED: 'endosulfan' is prohibited under CIB&RC / Pesticide Act 1968.
BANNED PESTICIDE DETECTED: 'monocrotophos' is prohibited under CIB&RC / Pesticide Act 1968.
data.recommendation: ⚠️ COMPLIANCE BLOCK: This recommendation has been blocked due to regulatory violations...
